items.title: Purpose Investments Inc. Announces August 2025 Distributions
items.description: TORONTO, Aug. 18, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Purpose Investments Inc. (“Purpose”) is pleased to announce distributions for the month of August 2025 for its open-end exchange-traded funds and closed-end funds (“the Funds”). The ex-distribution date for all Open-End Funds is August 27, 2025. The ex-distribution date for all closed-end funds is August 29, 2025. items.title: Sam Altman Says There’s an AI Bubble. What Wall Street Thinks.
items.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told reporters that he thinks the AI market is in a bubble. Not everyone is concerned.

items.title: As Apple Preps to Unveil AI Products, How Should You Play AAPL Stock?
items.description: Apple’s upcoming launch of AI-powered devices and robust financial results have analysts sounding cautiously optimistic, with most recommending to hold or buy as new products could reignite momentum in the stock.

items.title: Columbia Global Technology Growth Fund Q2 2025 Commentary
items.description: Columbia Threadneedle reports a standout quarter for its Global Tech Growth Fund, fueled by AI-driven gains. Explore how innovation is powering performance.

items.title: Exclusive-Arm hires Amazon AI exec to boost plans to build its own chips
items.description: SAN FRANCISCO (Reuters) -Arm Holdings has hired Amazon.com artificial intelligence chip director Rami Sinno to bolster its plans to develop its own complete chips, a person familiar with the matter said on Monday.  Sinno was responsible for helping to develop Amazon's homegrown AI chips called Trainium and Inferentia that are designed to help build and run large AI applications.  Until now, Arm has not built its own chips.
